note: Edit this file to change the showroom. No HTML changes needed. Images and mp4 files live in assets/showroom/. An entry with two or more frames renders as a story you can step through. An entry with a video field plays inline, using image as its poster frame. Leave image blank and a branded panel is drawn from the headline instead.

items.headline: Youth Entrepreneurship Applications Are Surging Across Canada
items.caption:
A new wave of young entrepreneurs is reshaping the Canadian business landscape. Futurpreneur is reporting a surge in applications as more youth pursue business ownership, signaling a generational shift worth paying attention to. For small and medium businesses, this trend points to a growing pool of fresh competitors, collaborators, and customers. BetaKit covers the full picture of what this momentum looks like across Canada.

#SmallBusiness #CanadianEntrepreneurs #TrendWatch
